arts.ttl: 'I'm a Liverpool target - I was set for dream transfer when medical flagged heart problem'
arts.sum: Fulham's Antonee Robinson, who is being watched by Liverpool, was on the brink of a transfer to AC Milan in 2020 before a medical revealed he had a heart abnormality

arts.ttl: Alexis Mac Allister sends emphatic Liverpool message as midfielder outlines future plans
arts.sum: Alexis Mac Allister wants to stay at Liverpool for many more years to come as he talks about the club's clear ambition to win trophies

arts.ttl: Liverpool transfer news: Reds renewals 'as good as done' for out-of-contract duo
arts.sum: Liverpool are reportedly close to keeping Mohamed Salah and Virgil van Dijk next season, with the pair's contract extensions 'as good as done'.

arts.ttl: Mo Salah's agent sends four-word Arne Slot message amid the Liverpool star's contract stand-off
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah 's agent has sent a four-word message to Liverpool manager Arne Slot amid the Egyptian's ongoing contract uncertainty.

arts.ttl: Michael Oliver banned from refereeing game, call to be dropped, Liverpool red card backlash
arts.sum: Premier League referee Michael Oliver has found himself at the centre of controversy this season but none more so than for his role in Everton's 2-2 draw with Liverpool this week

arts.ttl: Mo Salah nears Cristiano Ronaldo & Lionel Messi's incredibile records
arts.sum: There was late heartbreak for Liverpool in the Merseyside derby but it was another landmark occasion for Mohamed Salah. The Egyptian King has been one of Liverpool’s best ever signings...

arts.ttl: Liverpool FFP position explained amid huge Alexander Isak Newcastle United transfer update
arts.sum: Liverpool are reportedly considering a summer move for Premier League rivals Newcastle United's star centre-forward Alexander Isak

arts.ttl: Aston Villa vs Liverpool match request rejected by Premier League as club left 'frustrated'
arts.sum: Aston Villa and Liverpool are due to face off during a busy February for both clubs, though Unai Emery and Arne Slot will both enjoy a quieter time of things in March

arts.ttl: What Michael Oliver told Jordan Pickford moments before Everton equaliser vs Liverpool
arts.sum: James Tarkowski's 98th minute equaliser ensured that Everton fought back to draw 2-2 with Liverpool in the final Merseyside derby at Goodison Park - before things kicked off on the field post match

arts.ttl: Liverpool legend Phil Thompson opens up on brutal Sky Sports sacking as three axed in one day
arts.sum: Phil Thompson was axed by Sky Sports in 2020 after 22 years with the broadcaster
